name: PhilateLister stamp catalog
author: Exergy ∞ LLC
description: Entity shard: optional sales listing / asking price for a stamp.

entities.name: listing
entities.brief: Optional marketplace or guide pricing for a catalog stamp.
entities.description: Separate from philatelic attributes on stamp; omit when no price is tracked or use multiple rows for history or multi-channel asks.

fields.name: listing_id
fields.description: Surrogate primary key for this listing row.

fields.name: target_price
fields.description: Guide or asking price as a decimal in listing_currency.

fields.name: listing_currency
fields.description: ISO 4217 currency code for target_price (e.g. USD, EUR, DKK).
